demos.title: Skincare creator ad
demos.prompt: UGC-style ad: a young woman in a sunlit bathroom holds a glass serum bottle up to the camera and talks excitedly, iPhone selfie framing, ring-light catchlights in her eyes, authentic creator energy

demos.title: Sneaker unboxing
demos.prompt: Overhead unboxing video: hands lift limited-edition sneakers out of a box on a wooden desk, tissue paper crinkles, warm afternoon light, satisfying slow reveal

demos.title: Smoothie bowl pour
demos.prompt: POV food reel: thick berry smoothie pours into a ceramic bowl, granola sprinkled on top in slow motion, bright morning kitchen, appetizing macro detail

demos.title: Earbuds hero shot
demos.prompt: Studio product film: matte-black wireless earbuds rotate on a glass pedestal, dramatic rim lighting, dust particles drifting through the light beam

demos.title: Runway gown walk
demos.prompt: Fashion film: a model in a flowing crimson evening gown walks toward camera through a mirrored hallway, slow motion, cinematic lighting

demos.title: City rise reveal
demos.prompt: Aerial brand film: a drone rises over a neon-lit city at dusk revealing the skyline, cinematic teal and magenta color grade

demos.title: Safe-lifting scenario
demos.prompt: Workplace training scenario: a warehouse worker in a hi-vis vest demonstrates correct lifting posture beside tall shelving, a supervisor nods approval, clean instructional framing, bright even lighting

demos.title: Solar system lesson
demos.prompt: Educational lesson visual: the solar system forms from a swirling disk of dust and gas, planets condensing one by one around a young sun, clear scientific visualization, deep-space backdrop

demos.title: Launch-day announcement
demos.prompt: Internal announcement video: confetti drifts over a modern open-plan office as a small team celebrates a product launch at a standing desk, warm natural light, genuine energy

demos.title: Getting-started explainer
demos.prompt: SaaS onboarding explainer: a laptop on a tidy desk glows as an animated checklist ticks itself complete beside a steaming coffee cup, soft gradient light, modern tech aesthetic
